description_long: This is a compact, two-door coupe car with a classic 1980s design, featuring a sloped rear hatch and a distinct black side trim running along the lower body. The car is painted in a clean white color with black accents, including the wheels, window frames, and side mirrors. The front end is characterized by pop-up headlights and a low, angular hood, while the rear displays a wide window and a single exhaust pipe. The wheels are sporty, with a multi-spoke design and red highlights visible on the rims. The windows are tinted, and the car has a streamlined, aerodynamic silhouette typical of performance-oriented coupes. The overall build suggests a lightweight, agile vehicle suitable for urban and suburban driving.
description: A white, two-door coupe car with black trim, pop-up headlights, and a sporty, aerodynamic design. It features tinted windows, black wheels with red accents, and a sloped rear hatch.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two-door layout, black side trim, and sporty wheels with red accents.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide rear window, single exhaust pipe, and taillights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the two-door design and black trim, with clear visibility of the sloped rear hatch.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the pop-up headlights, low hood, and black front bumper.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
